metrics.name: test-compilation
metrics.command: sh -lc 'if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then ./mvnw -q -DskipTests test-compile; else mvn -q -DskipTests test-compile; fi'
metrics.description: Compila a suíte gerada antes de executar o restante das métricas

metrics.name: unit-tests
metrics.command: sh -lc 'if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then ./mvnw -q test; else mvn -q test; fi' && /absolute/path/to/witup-llm/bin/witup extrair-surefire --report-dir target/surefire-reports

metrics.name: test-pass-rate
metrics.command: sh -lc 'if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then ./mvnw -q test; else mvn -q test; fi' && /absolute/path/to/witup-llm/bin/witup extrair-surefire --report-dir target/surefire-reports --kind pass-rate
metrics.description: Percentual de testes aprovados via Surefire

metrics.name: target-method-coverage
metrics.description: Percentual de métodos-alvo com pelo menos um teste associado

metrics.name: assertive-tests-rate
metrics.description: Percentual de métodos de teste com pelo menos uma assertiva

metrics.name: exception-assertion-rate
metrics.description: Percentual de testes focados em assertivas de exceção

metrics.name: jacoco-line
metrics.command: sh -lc 'if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then ./mvnw -q test org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:report; else mvn -q test org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:report; fi' && /absolute/path/to/witup-llm/bin/witup extrair-jacoco --xml target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml --counter LINE

fallbacks.name: reuse-jacoco-report
fallbacks.description: Reaproveita um relatório JaCoCo já gerado pelo projeto

fallbacks.name: explicit-jacoco-agent
fallbacks.command: sh -lc 'if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then ./mvnw -q org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:prepare-agent test org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:report; else mvn -q org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:prepare-agent test org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:report; fi' && /absolute/path/to/witup-llm/bin/witup extrair-jacoco --xml target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml --counter LINE
fallbacks.description: Injeta o agente JaCoCo apenas quando o projeto não o configura

metrics.name: jacoco-branch
metrics.command: sh -lc 'if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then ./mvnw -q test org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:report; else mvn -q test org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:report; fi' && /absolute/path/to/witup-llm/bin/witup extrair-jacoco --xml target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml --counter BRANCH

fallbacks.name: reuse-jacoco-report
fallbacks.description: Reaproveita um relatório JaCoCo já gerado pelo projeto

fallbacks.name: explicit-jacoco-agent
fallbacks.command: sh -lc 'if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then ./mvnw -q org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:prepare-agent test org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:report; else mvn -q org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:prepare-agent test org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:0.8.12:report; fi' && /absolute/path/to/witup-llm/bin/witup extrair-jacoco --xml target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml --counter BRANCH
fallbacks.description: Injeta o agente JaCoCo apenas quando o projeto não o configura

metrics.name: pit-mutation
metrics.command: sh -lc 'if [ -x ./mvnw ]; then ./mvnw -q -DtimestampedReports=false -DoutputFormats=XML org.pitest:pitest-maven:1.23.0:mutationCoverage; else mvn -q -DtimestampedReports=false -DoutputFormats=XML org.pitest:pitest-maven:1.23.0:mutationCoverage; fi' && /absolute/path/to/witup-llm/bin/witup extrair-pit --report-dir target/pit-reports

fallbacks.name: reuse-pit-report
fallbacks.command: find target/pit-reports -name mutations.xml -print -quit | grep -q . && /absolute/path/to/witup-llm/bin/witup extrair-pit --report-dir target/pit-reports
fallbacks.description: Reaproveita um relatório PIT que já tenha sido gerado antes da falha

phase_two.visualization_title: Segunda fase: Google Guava vs Apache Commons Collections
